projects.title: 2048 Bot
projects.description: Automates play2048.co by reading board tiles from screen colors and choosing moves with expectimax (Python or compiled C strategy).

projects.title: Local AI Coding Agent
projects.description: Self-hosted coding-agent CLI that talks to an OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server and runs workspace tools with shell safety gates.

projects.title: ai_file
projects.description: Bash CLI wrapper around Ollama that auto-starts the local server and generates direct-to-file content from prompts.

projects.title: clink
projects.description: Command-line helper that injects reusable C comparator functions (e.g., qsort/bsearch int/long long comparators) into source files.

projects.title: fetch
projects.description: Codeforces problem fetcher CLI with difficulty filtering, seen-list tracking, history, cache refresh, and optional browser opening.

projects.title: Letter Boxed Solver
projects.description: Word-search solver for the Letter Boxed puzzle that filters a large dictionary and enumerates valid 2-word/3-word chains.

projects.title: Linear Algebra REPL Tool
projects.description: Custom exact-arithmetic linear algebra library/REPL with Fraction, Vector, Matrix, and System support plus row-reduction workflows.

projects.title: mac_texter
projects.description: macOS desktop automation script that uses keyboard simulation to compose and send messages through the Messages app.

projects.title: matrices.py
projects.description: Handwritten first-pass matrix solver implementing REF/RREF and solution interpretation for linear systems.

projects.title: pomodoro
projects.description: Terminal Pomodoro timer that schedules work/break rounds and plays alert audio between transitions.

projects.title: problem_emailer
projects.description: Suite of scripts that fetches coding problems (LeetCode/Codeforces/CSES) and emails scheduled daily/weekly challenges with caching/state.

projects.title: python-neofetch-dupe
projects.description: macfetch: neofetch-style macOS system info CLI with configurable output fields, color handling, and custom ASCII logos.

projects.title: transpiler
projects.description: Toy source-to-source transpiler that parses a small custom language and emits C code (`__out.c`).

projects.title: ttlx
projects.description: CLI utility that sends file content plus prompt instructions to Groq and writes generated LaTeX output (`.tex`) files.
